query:
INSERT INTO issue_assignees (id, issue_id, user_id)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
               RETURNING id          as "id!: Uuid",
                         issue_id    as "issue_id!: Uuid",
                         user_id     as "user_id!: Uuid",
                         assigned_at as "assigned_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
